title: wg-quick
html:
wg-quick

Shell

Use `wg-quick down /path/to/temp-file.conf` in order to be able to run the shell again.

cat >/path/to/temp-file.conf <<EOF
[Interface]
PostUp = /bin/sh
EOF

wg-quick up /path/to/temp-file.conf
excerpt: wg-quick Shell Use `wg-quick down /path/to/temp-file.conf` in order to be able to run the shell again. cat >/path/to/temp-file.conf <<EOF [Interface] PostUp = /bin/sh EOF wg-quick up /path/to/temp-file.conf
